connections._comment: === BG GPi → Thalamus relays (GATE — PFC stripes 0-2) ===
=== BG GPi → Thalamus relay (GATE — Broca VA nucleus) ===

connections.description: GPi_3 gates the VA thalamic relay for Broca. Tonically active = Merge blocked. Go pathway disinhibits = Merge permitted.

connections._comment: === BG GPi → Thalamus relay (GATE — temporal cortex) ===

connections.description: GPi_4 gates the temporal cortex relay. Controls whether new tokens enter the phonological buffer.

connections._comment: === Thalamus relays → PFC WM (gated input to working memory) ===
=== Thalamus VA relay → Broca BA44 (Merge permission return path) ===

connections.description: VA thalamus → BA44 trigger. This is the return path of the cortico-BG-thalamocortical loop. When the gate opens (BG disinhibits VA), this signal reaches BA44 trigger — permission to execute Merge.
Thalamic relay passes input column activations to temporal cortex slot 0.

connections._comment: === PFC → BG (PFC cortical inputs to striatum) ===
=== PFC WM0 → output cortex inhibitor (suppress output during processing) ===

connections.description: Initially zero weight — learns when to suppress output. Active WM should suppress premature output.
Broca's Merge output signals PFC sequencer that a structure is ready for execution.
Merged structure identity goes to PFC goal stripe.

connections._comment: === PFC → Broca BA45 (WM contents inform semantic selection) ===

connections.description: PFC WM contents inform Broca's semantic selection.

connections._comment: === Broca BA44 → BG (procedural gating — anterior putamen) ===

connections.description: BA44 Merge completion → putamen Go (stripe 3). After a successful Merge, signals BG to open the gate for the NEXT Merge.
BA44 trigger readiness → putamen Go. When workspace has Mergeable elements, trigger signals BG to consider opening the Merge gate.

connections._comment: === Broca BA45 → BG (declarative retrieval — caudate head) ===

connections.description: BA45 selection completion → caudate Go. When BA45 has decided what to Merge, signals BG to open the gate. Biologically: BA45 → caudate head, separate from BA44 → putamen, but both converge on GPi_3.
BA45 actively selecting → NoGo. While selection is in progress, inhibit premature Merge execution.

connections._comment: === Temporal cortex → Broca workspace (dorsal pathway — arcuate fasciculus) ===

connections.description: Arcuate fasciculus: most recent token from phonological buffer → Broca workspace slot 0.
Previous token → workspace slot 1.
Two tokens ago → workspace slot 2.
Three tokens ago → workspace slot 3 (weakest — oldest in buffer).

connections._comment: === Temporal cortex → Broca BA45 (ventral pathway — semantic) ===

connections.description: Ventral semantic pathway: lexical categorization from temporal cortex → BA45 semantic selection. Tells BA45 what TYPE of tokens are in the workspace.
Most recent token also goes to PFC WM (weaker path — main flow is through Broca).

connections._comment: === Broca workspace → output cortex (merged structure drives output) ===

connections.description: Merge completion RELEASES output cortex inhibition. After Merge, the result can drive output. Negative weight on inhibitor = disinhibition.

connections._comment: === PFC sequencer → BG temporal cortex gate (controls token intake timing) ===

connections.description: PFC sequencer signals when ready for next token → opens temporal cortex gate.
